Our Story

Art woven into
every stitch

At Maxim's, we believe that every cushion tells a story. Our skilled artisans in Tamil Nadu pour decades of craft knowledge and heartfelt passion into each piece — transforming fabric into something you'd be proud to place in your home.

We use only the finest materials — from whisper-soft satins to sumptuous velvets — and every cushion is fully customisable in colour, size, and style. Whether you're a boutique owner, an interior designer, or simply someone who appreciates the extraordinary, Maxim's is made for you.

Why Maxim's

What sets us apart

01
Artistry in Every Stitch
Skilled artisans pour decades of craft knowledge into each piece. The intricate smocking patterns are the result of meticulous, unhurried attention to detail.
02
Superior Quality
Only the finest fabrics — softest satins, lustrous silks, sumptuous velvets. Every component carefully selected for lasting beauty and comfort.
03
Personalised Touch
Every space is unique. Choose your colour, size, and style. Create a cushion that perfectly reflects your taste and complements your interior design.
04
Global Delivery
Rooted in Tamil Nadu with a worldwide reach. We understand what discerning homes and boutiques expect — and we deliver it to your door.
Get in Touch

Order or enquire

Whether you're placing a single order, a bulk wholesale request, or simply want to ask about custom colours — we'd love to hear from you.
